'''Bogg 11''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Bogden/Legends|Bogden]]. It often passed close enough to [[Bogg 4]] for the two moons to share [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], traveling together with [[Aia]], found the stolen [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']] there.

{{Moon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: The Fight to Survive]]'' {{1st}}
